name: Black Walnut Torte
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup finely chopped black walnuts or pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat whipping cream and brown sugar in a chilled large bowl until stiff.
2. Fold in walnuts.
3. Spread a small amount of whipped cream mixture on each of the 3 crackers.
4. Arrange the crackers, frosted sides down, with edges touching to form a rectangle on a serving plate.
5. Spread the rectangle with about 1/4 cup whipped cream mixture.
6. Layer with 3 crackers. Repeat layers 9 times.
7. Gently press the torte together.
8. Carefully turn the torte on its side with a spatula so the crackers are vertical.
9. Frost the sides and top with the remaining whipped cream mixture.
10. Refrigerate for at least 6 hours (the torte will mellow and become moist).
